display.purpose: Brand-level headings and rare hero moments.

body.purpose: Primary reading, product copy, forms, and navigation.

label.purpose: Buttons, controls, chips, metadata, and compact navigation.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Ambient depth for calm cards, headers, and primary actions.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Product state feedback, hover affordance, focus transitions, and reduced-motion-safe refinement.

motion.name: photo-hover
motion.purpose: Image-card overlay and scale transitions when motion is allowed.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for upload, submit, create, and confirm flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1f6f63; color: #ffffff; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(21, 26, 30, 0.08); transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #174d45; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f6f63; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet secondary command for navigation and alternate actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(255, 253, 249, 0.7); color: #364047; border: 1px solid #ebe2d7; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; transition: border-color 180ms ease-out, color 180ms ease-out, background-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #2f6f88; color: #1f5065; background: #fffdf9; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f6f63; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard form field for search, photo metadata, and album forms.
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: grid; gap: 4px; color: #364047; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-field { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #151a1e; padding: 8px 12px; font: inherit; font-weight: 400; } .ds-field:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f6f63; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Active filter chip with text plus an explicit remove affordance.
components.html: Tag: travel
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(31, 111, 99, 0.10); color: #1f6f63; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-chip-button { border: 0; background: transparent; color: currentColor; border-radius: 4px; font: inherit; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; } .ds-chip-button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f6f63; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Compact product navigation with icon, label, and clear active state.
components.html: ExploreAlbums
components.css: .ds-nav { display: grid; gap: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20); padding: 8px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-nav-item { border-radius: 8px; color: #65717b; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255, 253, 249, 0.70); color: #151a1e; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: #fffdf9; color: #174d45; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(21, 26, 30, 0.08); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1f6f63; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Photo Card
components.description: Signature image-first card with privacy status and readable overlay metadata.
components.html:
Public
Mountain lightby Erin
components.css: .ds-photo-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px; background: #151a1e; min-height: 220px; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(21, 26, 30, 0.08); color: #ffffff; } .ds-photo-card img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 220px; object-fit: cover; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ebe2d7, #dceaf0); transition: transform 500ms ease-out; } .ds-photo-card:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-photo-badge { position: absolute; left: 12px; top: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.30); border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); padding: 4px 8px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-photo-overlay { position: absolute; inset-inline: 0; bottom: 0; display: grid; gap: 4px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(21,26,30,0.86), rgba(21,26,30,0)); padding: 48px 12px 12px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-photo-overlay strong { font-family: Playfair Display, Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-photo-overlay span { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-size: 14px; } .ds-photo-card:focus-within { outline: 2px solid #1f6f63; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-photo-card img { transition: none; } .ds-photo-card:hover img { transform: none; } }

narrative.overview:
FrameHub should feel like a focused, modern gallery table where the photographs carry the emotion and the interface keeps everything legible, calm, and personal. The system uses warm surfaces, restrained teal-green actions, gentle borders, and predictable product controls so casual photo sharers can browse, upload, search, comment, and manage albums without feeling pushed into a social-media loop.

The visual language rejects the Instagram clone, the generic social media feed, and the flashy portfolio template. It also rejects generic SaaS dashboard styling: FrameHub is a gallery-management product, not a metrics console. Components should be familiar, keyboard-friendly, and clear about privacy states.
keyCharacteristics: Photo-first composition with quiet chrome and restrained controls.
Warm gallery surfaces balanced by pine and lagoon accents.
Serif display moments for brand identity; sans-serif UI text for product clarity.
Rounded, consistent controls with visible focus states.
Motion limited to state feedback, hover affordance, and reduced-motion-safe transitions.

rules.name: The Photo Leads Rule
rules.body: Pine, lagoon, and marigold are supporting colors. If a screen feels more like the palette than the photos, reduce accent usage.

rules.name: The Privacy Is Not Color Rule
rules.body: Privacy states must use text labels and icons, not color alone.

rules.name: The UI Stays Sans Rule
rules.body: Never use Playfair Display for buttons, form labels, navigation, data, or repeated operational text.

rules.name: The Image Gets The Drama Rule
rules.body: Reserve stronger shadow and scale treatments for photos and viewer surfaces, not routine panels.

dos: Do let photos provide the strongest visual energy on gallery, explore, and detail screens.
Do use Pine for primary actions and active states, Lagoon for secondary discovery cues, and Marigold sparingly.
Do keep keyboard focus visible with the shared Pine ring on every interactive element.
Do pair privacy labels with icons and readable text.
Do respect `prefers-reduced-motion` and keep product transitions in the 150-250ms range when possible.
donts: Don't make FrameHub feel like an Instagram clone, a generic social media feed, or a flashy portfolio template.
Don't use excessive gradients, oversized animations, cluttered cards, generic SaaS dashboard styling, or engagement-first dark patterns.
Don't let decorative UI compete with the photographs.
Don't rely on color alone for privacy states, errors, tags, or status indicators.
Don't use Playfair Display for buttons, labels, data, or other repeated product UI.
